data.name: Sex Machina
data.detailed_description:
The city was destroyed and deserted long ago. But the stalker and his sidekick, a super sexy female robot, were on the lookout for all sorts of dangers. The hot female wildling turned out to be more of an insane sexual adventure than danger, though. The two used her tight exotic body to commit each and every sin known in that universe.

The Sex Machina adult visual novel is inspired by Ex Machina, a science fiction thriller film written and directed by Alex Garland.

Key Features

• Full HD+ (1920x1440 pixels) resolution graphics

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• 100% uncensored sex scenes of orgy with Wildling Girl, Stalker and Android

• Girl's, Android's and Stalker's hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

WISHLIST & FOLLOW FOR UPDATES!

Upcoming updates:

• LOVENSE sex toys support for unforgettable pleasure & satisfaction

• Translation into other languages ​​upon your requests, post your wishes on the game hub!

data.short_description: The city was destroyed and deserted long ago. But the stalker and his sidekick, a super sexy female robot, were on the lookout for all sorts of dangers. The hot female wildling turned out to be more of an insane sexual adventure than danger, though. The two used her body to commit every sin known!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: M1
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
